    G

    Gamebar - Class in Screen.Game
    Gamebar on top screen to use method of this game
    Gamebar() - Constructor for class Screen.Game.Gamebar
    constructor initialize object in Gamebar
    GamePaneImage - Class in Logic
    this class this for setup game logic and map logic
    GamePaneImage() - Constructor for class Logic.GamePaneImage
    constructor class to initialize playerPosition , player Image , map Image , map Location , map Logic
    GamePaneImage(String) - Constructor for class Logic.GamePaneImage
    set Player image when and is start
    GameScreen - Class in Screen.Game
    GameScreen set Layer and placing of this game
    GameScreen(ScreenManager) - Constructor for class Screen.Game.GameScreen
    constructor initialize object in GameScreen and update gameScreen when action
    GameSession - Class in Logic
    this class connect between PlayerCreate and GamePane
    GameSession() - Constructor for class Logic.GameSession

    Test Class for GameSessionTest
    GameSessionTest() - Constructor for class Logic.GameSessionTest
